name: AES Algorithm
description: Symmetric block cipher. 128-bit blocks, 128/192/256-bit keys. Rounds: SubBytes, ShiftRows, MixColumns, AddRoundKey.
mermaid:
graph TD
    A1["128-bit plaintext block\n128/192/256-bit key"]
    B1["Key expansion\nGenerate round keys"]
    C1["AddRoundKey state xor round key"]
    D1{"More rounds?"}
    C2["SubBytes S-box\nShiftRows\nMixColumns\nAddRoundKey"]
    C3["SubBytes ShiftRows AddRoundKey\nfinal round no MixColumns"]
    F1["Return ciphertext block"]
    A1 --> B1
    B1 --> C1
    C1 --> D1
    D1 -->|Yes| C2
    D1 -->|No| C3
    C2 --> D1
    C3 --> F1
    classDef red fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff,stroke:#c0392b
    classDef yellow fill:#ffd43b,color:#000,stroke:#f59f00
    classDef green fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    classDef lightblue fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff,stroke:#4dabf7
    classDef violet fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef lavender fill:#e6e6fa,color:#333,stroke:#b19cd9
    class A1 red
    class B1 yellow
    class C1,C2,C3 green
    class F1 violet
    class D1 lavender
